_meta.purpose: Curated real Malaysian scholarships for school leavers (SPM / pre-university). Upserted into the `scholarships` table on boot (edit + restart to refresh). Matched to the student's profile by field/stage tags, and state-foundation scholarships surface for students from that state. We NEVER decide whether a student qualifies - we suggest relevance and show an eligibility SUMMARY only.
_meta.honesty: Requirements are summaries, not the full official criteria. Deadlines and terms change every year. Every entry carries lastVerified and the UI shows 'check the full criteria on the official site'. This is guidance, not official advice.
_meta.types: merit = based on results/achievement; need = based on financial need; bonded = requires a work/service commitment after graduation.

scholarships.name: Yayasan Khazanah Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Tuition, living allowance and development programmes at top local and overseas universities.
requirements: Malaysian citizen with outstanding academic results
Admission (or a strong offer) to a top-ranked university
scholarships.deadline: Applications usually open early in the year

scholarships.name: JPA Scholarship (Program Penajaan)
scholarships.benefit: Government sponsorship for pre-university and degree studies, local or overseas.
requirements: Bond: serve a period with the government or an approved employer after graduation
scholarships.deadline: Opens after SPM results are released

scholarships.name: Bank Negara Kijang Emas Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Full sponsorship for A-Levels/IB and a degree at a leading overseas university.
requirements: Interested in economics, finance, law or related fields

scholarships.name: Petronas Education Sponsorship Programme (PESP)
scholarships.benefit: Full sponsorship for foundation and degree, mainly in engineering, geoscience and technical fields.
requirements: Excellent SPM results in science subjects
Interest in engineering, geoscience or technical fields
Bond: serve with Petronas after graduation

scholarships.name: Shell Malaysia Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship for degree studies in engineering and related disciplines, with internships.
requirements: Strong results in maths and science
Pursuing engineering, geoscience or a related field
May include a service commitment with Shell
scholarships.deadline: Check the official site for the current intake

scholarships.name: Yayasan UEM Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship for local degree studies, focused on engineering and the built environment.
requirements: Malaysian citizen with financial need considered

scholarships.name: Yayasan Sime Darby Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship across sustainability, engineering, business and the arts at local and overseas universities.
requirements: Offer from an approved university and course
scholarships.deadline: Opens around the start of the year

scholarships.name: Maybank Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship for degree studies with internship and career opportunities at Maybank.
requirements: Interest in banking, finance, business or technology

scholarships.name: Public Bank Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Support for degree studies in finance, accounting, IT and related fields.

scholarships.name: MARA Education Sponsorship
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship and loans for Bumiputera students, local and overseas.
requirements: Some awards convert to a loan or carry conditions

scholarships.name: ASEAN Scholarship (Singapore)
scholarships.benefit: Sponsorship to study pre-university (and beyond) at top schools in Singapore.
requirements: Malaysian citizen within the eligible age range
A service or bond condition may apply

scholarships.name: Yayasan Selangor Education Assistance
scholarships.benefit: Education aid and scholarships for Selangor students, with financial need considered.
scholarships.deadline: Check the official site for the current cycle

scholarships.name: Yayasan Sarawak Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Scholarships and study loans for Sarawakian students at all levels.

scholarships.name: Yayasan Pahang Education Assistance
scholarships.benefit: Education aid for Pahang students, with need and results considered.

scholarships.name: Yayasan Johor Corporation Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Scholarships and study aid for Johor students at local universities.

scholarships.name: Penang Future Foundation
scholarships.benefit: Scholarship for high-achieving students to study at selected local universities.
requirements: Penang-born or resident, or studying in Penang
Household income within the set limit
Bond: work in Penang for a period after graduation

scholarships.name: Great Eastern Life Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Support for students in actuarial science, finance, IT and related fields.
requirements: Strong results in maths and relevant subjects
Pursuing an actuarial, finance or IT degree

scholarships.name: PTPTN Study Loan
scholarships.benefit: Low-interest study loan for tuition and living costs at approved institutions (a loan, not a grant).
requirements: Malaysian citizen enrolled at an approved institution
